summary: Testing complete for Manage Orders module, Outlet Management enhancements, and Branch Summary Dashboard. All backend APIs pass (18/18 tests). Frontend UI fully functional.

issues: React Hook useEffect has missing dependency warnings (fetchOrders, applyFilters) - cosmetic ESLint warnings
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

action_items: Fix ESLint warnings in ManageOrders.js (add useCallback or include dependencies)
Add DialogDescription to dialog components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: ManageOrders.js (630 lines) - consider splitting into smaller components for maintainability
Payment dialog works correctly - successfully records payments and updates order amounts
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and outlets with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: 1) Outlet Management with username/password in both create and edit forms, 2) Branch Summary Dashboard showing per-outlet metrics, 3) Manage Orders with full tab filtering, search, status filter, order details view, payment dialog, and KOT print functionality, 4) Status workflow (Confirmed→Ready→Picked Up→Delivered) triggers WhatsApp notifications (AiSensy returns 400 due to no active plan). Backend has 18 pytest tests covering all CRUD operations.
features_verified: Outlet Management: Create outlet with username/password - WORKING
Outlet Management: Edit outlet with optional password update - WORKING (password field shows 'Leave empty to keep current password')
Super Admin Dashboard: Branch-wise summary table displays correctly - WORKING (shows outlet name, total orders, today's orders, pending orders, total income)
Manage Orders: Page loads with orders list - WORKING
Manage Orders: Tab filtering (All, Confirmed, Ready, Delivery, Delivered, Cancelled) - WORKING
Manage Orders: Search by order number, customer name, or phone - WORKING
Manage Orders: Status filter dropdown - WORKING
Manage Orders: View order details modal - WORKING (shows customer info, delivery info, cake details, payment info)
Manage Orders: Update order status (Confirmed→Ready→Picked Up→Delivered) - WORKING
Manage Orders: Add payment dialog - WORKING (pre-fills pending amount, shows payment method selector)
Manage Orders: Payment updates order's paid_amount and pending_amount - WORKING
Manage Orders: KOT print button present - WORKING
Status update triggers WhatsApp notification - WORKING (AiSensy API called, returns 400 due to no active plan)
Navigation: Manage Orders menu item in sidebar - WORKING
whatsapp_integration_note: WhatsApp notifications are triggered correctly on status updates but AiSensy returns 400 error: 'No Plan active on assistant!' - this is expected as test account has no active plan
